# Silicon comp matrix (placeholder)

Placeholder 45-vendor comparison matrix. The Studio canary's real
comp matrix exceeds 1500 lines and includes load-bearing
private-company data; this fixture stub stands in for the *shape* of
the cross-thread shared evidence, not the content.

When any of the five sibling memo threads cites
`[research/comps/silicon-comp-matrix.md]`, the resolver (issue #280)
ensures that citation resolves to THIS file via the portfolio-level
research pool.
